name: Thresher
overview: Deep in the abyss, a motley crew boards the S.S. Thresher submarine to explore the abandoned Rán Boer station. Fighting claustrophobia, paranoia, oceanic behemoths, and hidden horrors, one thing is certain: from the deep, power rises.

trailers.title: Now Introducing, Thresher! A Two-Part Underwater Horror Epic
